creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
print/acroread9 9.3 is available from Adobe.
	earlier version is vulnerable.
	see http://www.adobe.com/support/security/advisories/apsa09-07.html

Fix: 

change "9.2" to "9.3" in Makefile.
	distinfo about print/acroread and some localized versions are the following:
	MD5 (acroread/AdbeRdr9.3-1_i486linux_enu.tar.bz2) = 0f63e9d8b9ef3d07abbb4e1a6eb45b3f
	SHA256 (acroread/AdbeRdr9.3-1_i486linux_enu.tar.bz2) = aa6b51977ed50d935045f3b5946007d1806125897a294e6d69cd483a9bc0eb5a
	SIZE (acroread/AdbeRdr9.3-1_i486linux_enu.tar.bz2) = 60263537

	MD5 (acroread/AdbeRdr9.3-1_i486linux_jpn.tar.bz2) = 2ec0c3d427ba60e7f0cf6b0a56d41acc
	SHA256 (acroread/AdbeRdr9.3-1_i486linux_jpn.tar.bz2) = 2e47d1955ba21e447501f269b5130cdc09343f2f726d9a31dc896e19f4b9234a
	SIZE (acroread/AdbeRdr9.3-1_i486linux_jpn.tar.bz2) = 68413765

	MD5 (acroread/AdbeRdr9.3-1_i486linux_fra.tar.bz2) = ab6bccafa6dfb080e2adc08d3b28f03a
	SHA256 (acroread/AdbeRdr9.3-1_i486linux_fra.tar.bz2) = 3885b25904fead0a48018e4b4eea2722fd51477915f07f333a7053a80b3ad213
	SIZE (acroread/AdbeRdr9.3-1_i486linux_fra.tar.bz2) = 64542014

	MD5 (acroread/AdbeRdr9.3-1_i486linux_deu.tar.bz2) = 2fec5e86766e4fd7ddce8eab5d90e3e4

	SIZE (acroread/AdbeRdr9.3-1_i486linux_deu.tar.bz2) = 65917336

	no updates are available for print/acroread8.
	I do not know the reason.
